tool_args.hypothesis: _atLeastRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE) is mis-implemented or bypassable, allowing anyone to add strategies and modify vault strategy list (privilege escalation).

steps.tool_result: {"ok": true, "target_function": "addStrategy", "hypothesis": "_atLeastRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE) is mis-implemented or bypassable, allowing anyone to add strategies and modify vault strategy list (privilege escalation)."}

tool_args.exploit_logic: Call addStrategy from an EOA without roles to add a mock strategy contract that points back to the vault and accept any want; verify that strategy was added by reading strategies mapping and withdrawalQueue. The PoC deploys a fake strategy implementing IStrategy.vault() and want(), then calls addStrategy and asserts events/state changed.
